# services.aerospace

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.aerospace`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.aerospace.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable AeroSpace window manager. |
| `services.aerospace.package` | `package` | The aerospace package to use. |
| `services.aerospace.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | AeroSpace configuration, see <link xlink:href="https://nikitabobko.github.io/AeroSpace/guide#configuring-aerospace"/> for supported values. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.accordion-padding` | `signed integer` | Padding between windows in an accordion container. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.after-login-command` | `list of string` | Do not use AeroSpace to run commands after login. (Managed by launchd instead) |
| `services.aerospace.settings.after-startup-command` | `list of string` | Add commands that run after AeroSpace startup |
| `services.aerospace.settings.default-root-container-layout` | `one of "tiles", "accordion"` | Default layout for the root container. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.default-root-container-orientation` | `one of "horizontal", "vertical", "auto"` | Default orientation for the root container. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.enable-normalization-flatten-containers` | `boolean` | Containers that have only one child are "flattened". |
| `services.aerospace.settings.enable-normalization-opposite-orientation-for-nested-containers` | `boolean` | Containers that nest into each other must have opposite orientations. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.exec-on-workspace-change` | `list of string` | Commands to run every time workspace changes. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.key-mapping.preset` | `one of "qwerty", "dvorak", "colemak"` | Keymapping preset. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-focus-changed` | `list of string` | Commands to run every time focused window or workspace changes. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-focused-monitor-changed` | `list of string` | Commands to run every time focused monitor changes. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected` | `list of (submodule)` | Commands to run every time a new window is detected with optional conditions. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*."if"` | `submodule` | Conditions for detecting a window. |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*."if".app-id` | `null or string` | The application ID to match (optional). |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*."if".app-name-regex-substring` | `null or string` | Regex substring to match the app name (optional). |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*."if".during-aerospace-startup` | `null or boolean` | Whether to match during aerospace startup (optional). |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*."if".window-title-regex-substring` | `null or string` | Substring to match in the window title (optional). |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*."if".workspace` | `null or string` | The workspace name to match (optional). |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*.check-further-callbacks` | `null or boolean` | Whether to check further callbacks after this rule (optional). |
| `services.aerospace.settings.on-window-detected.*.run` | `string or list of string` | Commands to execute when the conditions match (required). |
| `services.aerospace.settings.start-at-login` | `boolean` | Do not start AeroSpace at login. (Managed by launchd instead) |
| `services.aerospace.settings.workspace-to-monitor-force-assignment` | `attribute set of (signed integer or string or list of string)` | Map workspaces to specific monitors. Left-hand side is the workspace name, and right-hand side is the monitor pattern. |
